summary: Discovered University of Sydney AI policy and guidance pages through site-restricted official-domain search. Verified 7 standing official sources and rejected 14 news, intranet, journal, training, or low-specificity pages. Key themes include academic integrity, AI acknowledgment, assessment defaults, Copilot/student guidance, and assessment procedures.
